backpack.title: The Row
backpack.titleText: Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. rows.title: Overlord
rows.titleText:
You wake up feeling full with the brim of unfamiliar energy. 

Apparently you are chosen by V!$$@ to be this version of earth overlord, someone with the power over others, fictional characters to be exact. 

You have 10 energies to spent.

rows.title: Binding
rows.titleText: Your bond between your minion. Can only choose one.

objects.title: Master
objects.text: They always follow your order to the best of their understanding. They still have their memories/personality but completely obey anything you order them to as if its the most normal thing for them.

objects.title: Owner
objects.text: Their mind arent bound to you like their body so while they still obey all of your order, they will able use loophole on your order if they want to or its vague enough; like making a face, doing it incomplete, and so on. They cant directly harm you though because of the binding

objects.title: Harem
objects.text: At arrival, they willingly become one of your minion, finding you very attractive, love you, and perceive you as their ideal partner. While they pretty much obey your order and lenient about you, there still things they wont do or against to depending on their character.

objects.title: Linked
objects.text: While you dont have any direct control over your minion other than your powers, their existences are tied on your "soul" now so your death also means theirs and they can feel it. whether this make them obey you or not really depend on them.

objects.title: None
objects.text: There is nothing binding them to you or any sign of your involvement, they just brought to your location and free to do whatever they want, your power still work on them though so maybe you can still have their loyalty from other way like a contract or so

rows.title: Minion
rows.titleText: Pick from any medium they ever exist, they carry anything they wear and hold at the time you choose. Pick the same minion multiple times if you want and decide which version for each.

rows.title: Powers
rows.titleText:
Your power as overlord.

By paying half more on a power, you can have the cooldown of that power reduced by a tier; month > day, day > hour, hour > minute, minute > second, and second > instant.

Upgrade for free power cost 0.5

objects.title: Mental Command
objects.text: You can talk or order one of your minion directly to their mind regardless the distance but must wait few seconds to switch on other minion, they can respond you if you want and both your language is translated automatically to both understanding.

objects.title: Overlord's Aura
objects.text: Your minion doesn't require any biological need like eat or sleep so long they are around you, they also always have energy to do your bidding, this doesn't include magical stuff.

objects.title: Eternal Duty
objects.text: You can bring back some or all of your minion to the same state as their arrival every month, basically heal or revive them. They still remember all that happen before and this doesn't include their gear.

objects.title: Recall Minion
objects.text: For every minute you can bring some or all of your minion to your side instantly regardless the distance or their condition, this include anything they wear and hold.

objects.title: Mend Arsenal
objects.text: you can restore some or all of your minion equipment to full condition by summon it to you each day. Be it lost, low on energy, destroyed, and such. Always reuse same one, no copies.

objects.title: Pocket Minion
objects.text: Transform your minion into any simple object that is unbreakable, while transformed they don't age and put into stasis. You can transform or change them back anytime but it take few seconds.

objects.title: Mirror Image
objects.text: You can create duplicates from any of your owned minions equal the total number of them, so it can be the same multiple copies or different one. They are exact copy including the gear but have master instead other binding you choose. Mend arsenal don't work on their gear and if killed, the body and their gear vanish, the process can be done anytime but take minute to finish.

objects.title: Drones
objects.text: You can at will take direct control of your minion, basically feels like its your own body. While you can control multiple at the same, it will be the same as manually controlling multiple joysticks so you gonna be constantly go back and forth. Controlling or switching take seconds.

objects.title: "Isekai"
objects.text: You and your other minions are brought into one of your chosen minion world instead coming to yours. Not necessarily on their death place, anywhere at that time you want.

objects.title: Reversed
objects.text: All or some of your minion come from the world where default gender role/genital is different. It could be reversed, both, something in between, and so on you pick the detail. Everything else mostly same.

objects.title: Reset
objects.text: One or all of your minion memory get wiped. They still know their skills, knowledge, and such but their identity and memories is gone.

defaultRowText: This is a row, and inside of it, you can place choices. On both rows and choices Requirements can be placed, which will block a row from being viewed, or make the player unable to select a choice, depending on either Point-types or the Ids of other choices. Point-types can be made in Features then Manage Points. Hovering over buttons will explain what they do. The Design of the project can be changed in 'Modify Design' at the side navigation bar, and private styling for each row can be turned on in the rows Settings. Default text like this can be turned off in Features -> Manage Defaults.
defaultChoiceText: This is a Choice, and inside of it, you can place images and text. Scores can be added to it, and have Point-types attached. Addons can be added underneath the image and text. In the Functions at the bottom of the choice, there is an array of different things that can be done. Default text like this can be turned off in Features then Manage Defaults.
